parsed.title: Volkswagen T-Cross 1.0 TSI Comfortline DSG 2021
parsed.description: Well-maintained 2021 Volkswagen T-Cross in Reflex Silver, powered by a 1.0-litre turbocharged petrol engine with 85kW paired to a smooth 7-speed automatic transmission. This crossover has covered 61,500km and boasts a full service history, kept by one careful owner in a non-smoking environment. Equipped with aircon, cruise control, park sensors, Bluetooth and App-Connect for everyday convenience. Recently fitted with new front tyres. There is a small stone chip on the bonnet, reflected in the pricing.

parsed.title: 2021 VW T-Cross 1.0 TSI Comfortline DSG
parsed.description: This 2021 Volkswagen T-Cross 1.0 TSI Comfortline DSG presents in smart Reflex Silver with a clean, single-owner history from Pretoria. The 85kW three-cylinder turbopetrol pairs with a smooth 7-speed DSG automatic, making it an effortless daily companion in the city or on the highway. Comfortline spec brings aircon, cruise control, rear park sensors, Bluetooth, and Volkswagen App-Connect as standard. Fresh front tyres have been fitted, and full service history is in order — buyers should note a minor stone chip on the bonnet. At 61 500 km this T-Cross represents a well-maintained, non-smoker example at an accessible price point of R289 900.

parsed.title: 2021 VW T-Cross 1.0 TSI DSG
parsed.description: This 2021 Volkswagen T-Cross 1.0 TSI Comfortline DSG in Reflex Silver is a well-maintained one-owner crossover with full service history. The automatic transmission and 85kW turbocharged engine deliver efficient performance, while features like aircon, cruise control, and App-Connect enhance comfort and convenience. The car has 61,500km on the clock and comes with new front tyres. Note a small stone chip on the bonnet.

parsed.title: 2021 VW T-Cross 1.0 TSI Auto
parsed.description: This 2021 Volkswagen T-Cross 1.0 TSI Comfortline DSG in Reflex Silver has covered 61,500 km and comes with full service history. One owner, non-smoker vehicle with new front tyres and factory-fitted features including cruise control, park sensors, Bluetooth and App-Connect. Finished in sleek Reflex Silver with a small stone chip on the bonnet, it drives smoothly with its 7-speed DSG automatic transmission and efficient 85kW petrol engine.

parsed.title: 3-bed townhouse, pool, solar, Centurion
parsed.description: Well-maintained three-bedroom, two-bathroom townhouse in a secure estate. Built in 2014 with 168m² of living space across a 320m² erf. The north-facing lounge benefits from natural light, while the kitchen was recently renovated in 2024. Practical features include a double garage, communal pool, solar inverter system, and fibre connectivity. Pet-friendly property with walking distance to primary school; available now.

A double garage, solar/inverter backup, and fibre connectivity add everyday practicality, while the communal pool and pet-friendly rules broaden the appeal. parsed.title: 3-Bed Townhouse in Secure Centurion Estate
parsed.description: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom townhouse (168m²) in a secure estate offers modern living with a renovated 2024 kitchen and north-facing lounge. Enjoy communal pool access, solar/inverter backup, and a double garage. Walking distance to a primary school, the property is pet-friendly and available immediately. Monthly levies are R1,850 and rates R1,230.

parsed.title: 3-Bed Townhouse in Secure Estate
parsed.description: Spacious 3-bed, 2-bath townhouse in a secure, pet-friendly estate in Centurion. North-facing lounge with excellent light; kitchen updated in 2024. Double garage and 24/7 estate security offer convenience and peace of mind. Communal pool and solar/inverter setup enhance comfort and efficiency. Levies at R1,850/month with R1,230 in monthly municipal rates.

parsed.title: Maths & Science Tutor | Grades 10-12 | Centurion & Online
parsed.description: Eight years of teaching experience in Maths and Physical Science for senior learners. BSc Mathematics graduate with PGCE qualification, offering 1-on-1 and small group tuition in Centurion or online nationwide. Sessions focus on exam preparation, past-paper drills, and structured progress tracking. Students show an average 14% improvement over one term. Available weekdays 14:00-19:00, starting immediately at R350 per hour, with ongoing WhatsApp support between lessons.

parsed.title: Qualified Maths & Science Tutor – Centurion & Online
parsed.description: Experienced Maths and Physical Science tutor with 8 years in the field, holding a BSc Mathematics from the University of Pretoria and a PGCE. Sessions cover Grades 10 to 12, including Matric exam preparation, and are offered one-on-one or in small groups — in person across Centurion or online to students nationwide. Structured around past-paper drills, with progress reports issued regularly and WhatsApp support available between sessions. Students have recorded an average improvement of 14% within a single term. Available on weekdays from 14:00 to 19:00, with tutoring commencing immediately at R350 per hour.

parsed.title: Experienced Maths & Science Tutor
parsed.description: Qualified tutor with 8 years' experience teaching Grades 10-12 Maths and Physical Science. Achieves an average +14% improvement in one term. Available weekdays 14:00-19:00 for 1-on-1 or small group sessions in Centurion or online nationwide. Includes exam prep, past-paper drills, and WhatsApp support.

parsed.title: Matric Maths & Science Tutor
parsed.description: Experienced tutor with 8 years' experience and a BSc in Mathematics (UP) plus PGCE qualification. Specialises in Maths and Physical Science for Grades 10–12, offering both in-person sessions in Centurion and online tuition nationwide. Proven results with an average 14% improvement over one term. Sessions available weekdays between 14:00 and 19:00, including exam prep, past-paper drills, and progress reports. WhatsApp support provided for ongoing assistance.

parsed.title: Certified Electrician, 12 Years, 24/7 Pretoria East
parsed.description: Fully qualified wireman with Department of Labour registration and 12 years' hands-on experience. Handles DB board upgrades, fault finding, solar and inverter installations, with compliance certificates (CoC) issued for all work. Services cover Pretoria East and Centurion with 24/7 emergency call-outs available. All work carried out using SABS-approved materials and backed by a 6-month workmanship guarantee.

parsed.title: Licensed Electrician | Pretoria East & Centurion | 24/7
parsed.description: A Wireman's licence holder with 12 years of hands-on electrical experience, this tradesperson covers Pretoria East and Centurion with a flat call-out rate of R450. Specialities include DB board upgrades, fault finding, solar and inverter installations, and the issuing of Compliance Certificates (CoC) — all completed using SABS-approved materials. Every job carries a six-month workmanship guarantee, providing meaningful cover beyond handover. Emergency and after-hours call-outs are available 24/7, and the business is registered with the Department of Labour.

parsed.title: Experienced Electrician in Pretoria East
parsed.description: Licensed electrician with 12 years' experience serving Pretoria East and Centurion. Specialising in DB board upgrades, fault finding, and solar/inverter installations. Provides SABS-approved materials and a 6-month workmanship guarantee. 24/7 emergency call-out available for urgent repairs.

parsed.title: Certified Electrician 24/7 Call-Out
parsed.description: Fully licensed Wireman with 12 years' experience serving Pretoria East and Centurion. Registered with the Department of Labour and qualified to issue compliance certificates (CoC). Specialises in DB board upgrades, fault finding, and solar/inverter installations. All work uses SABS-approved materials and comes with a 6-month workmanship guarantee. 24/7 emergency call-out available at R450.

parsed.title: 1974 Krugerrand 1oz Gold Coin NGC MS65
parsed.description: This 1974 Krugerrand 1 oz gold coin presents in NGC MS65 grade, encapsulated and unaltered since grading. The piece retains its original lustre and has been held in a single-family collection since purchase from Rand Refinery. Verification of the NGC certification number is available online for full transparency. A substantial holding for collectors seeking established South African bullion with documented provenance.

parsed.title: 1974 Krugerrand 1oz Gold – NGC MS65 Certified
parsed.description: A first-year-of-issue 1974 Krugerrand in highly coveted NGC MS65 grade, encapsulated in original NGC slab with certification verifiable on the NGC website. The coin retains full original lustre and has never been cleaned, presenting exactly as it left the Rand Refinery over fifty years ago. Provenance traces to a single family from the point of purchase, adding meaningful collecting history to an already significant piece. At R48 500 this is a correctly priced, investment-grade example for the serious South African gold collector. Located in Pretoria.

parsed.title: 1974 Krugerrand 1 oz NGC MS65
parsed.description: A pristine 1974 1 oz Krugerrand in NGC MS65 condition, encapsulated and uncleaned, retaining original lustre. From a single-family collection since purchase, this Rand Refinery issue carries verifiable NGC certification. A rare opportunity for collectors seeking certified South African gold. No flaws noted.

parsed.title: Wolkberg sunrise hike, guide and breakfast included
parsed.description: Guided sunrise hike through Wolkberg wilderness, departing from the Haenertsburg area. This is a moderate outing covering 9 km with 450 m of ascent over 6 hours. Your registered mountain guide handles permits and leads groups of 2 to 8 people, with trail breakfast and professional photos included. Available March through October. Exact meeting point shared after booking.

raw: {"title": "Guided Sunrise Hike, Wolkberg Wilderness – Polokwane Area", "description": "Experience the Wolkberg wilderness at its most rewarding with this guided sunrise hike, covering 9 km and 450 m of ascent over six hours. Groups of two to eight are led by a registered mountain guide, with permits handled and a trail breakfast included along the way. Professional photos are provided, so the focus stays on the landscape rather than your phone. The moderate grading means a reasonable level of fitness is required — this is not a casual stroll. parsed.title: Guided Sunrise Hike, Wolkberg Wilderness – Polokwane Area
parsed.description: Experience the Wolkberg wilderness at its most rewarding with this guided sunrise hike, covering 9 km and 450 m of ascent over six hours. Groups of two to eight are led by a registered mountain guide, with permits handled and a trail breakfast included along the way. Professional photos are provided, so the focus stays on the landscape rather than your phone. The moderate grading means a reasonable level of fitness is required — this is not a casual stroll. Operating March through October, the meeting point in the Haenertsburg area is confirmed after booking. Priced at R950 per person.

parsed.title: Guided Wolkberg Sunrise Hike Adventure
parsed.description: Experience the Wolkberg wilderness on a 6-hour guided hike with stunning sunrise views. The moderate 9 km trail includes a 450 m ascent, perfect for adventurers seeking a challenge. Your booking includes a registered guide, permits, a trail breakfast, and photos to remember. Available March to October, meeting point shared after booking. Ideal for groups of 2-8 people.

parsed.title: Sunrise Hike Wolkberg Wilderness
parsed.description: Join a guided sunrise hike through the misty Wolkberg wilderness, a 6-hour adventure covering 9 km with 450 m of ascent. Led by a registered mountain guide, this moderate hike includes all necessary permits, a trail breakfast, and professional photos of your journey. The route rewards steady legs with panoramic views and pristine fynbos, ideal for small groups of 2 to 8. Best experienced March to October, meeting in the Haenertsburg area with full details shared post-booking. Note: not suitable for those with knee or mobility issues.

parsed.title: Handmade Solid Oak Dining Table, Seats 8
parsed.description: Solid oak dining table handcrafted by a local workshop with 15 years of woodworking expertise. Measures 2.0 m x 1.0 m and comfortably seats eight. Finished with Danish oil for a warm, matt appearance that develops character with use. Made to order with a three-week lead time. Matching bench available as an optional extra.

parsed.title: Solid Oak Dining Table – Handmade, Seats 8, Pretoria
parsed.description: This handmade solid oak dining table measures a generous 2.0 m x 1.0 m, comfortably seating eight guests and built to last a lifetime. Finished in Danish oil for a clean, matt surface that enhances the natural grain without overpowering it. The table is made to order by a Pretoria-based workshop with 15 years of woodworking experience, with a lead time of approximately three weeks from order confirmation. A matching bench is available as an optional addition, making it straightforward to complete the look. Priced at R13 500, this represents honest value for a piece built from solid timber rather than engineered board.

parsed.title: Solid Oak Dining Table - Handmade
parsed.description: A beautifully crafted solid oak dining table, finished with Danish oil for a warm, matt look. Built to seat eight, it measures 2.0m x 1.0m and is made to order with a 3-week lead time. Optional matching bench available. Expertly crafted by a local workshop with 15 years of woodworking experience.

parsed.title: Handmade Solid Oak Dining Table
parsed.description: Handcrafted dining table built from solid oak by a local workshop with 15 years of woodworking experience. Sized at 2.0 m x 1.0 m, it comfortably seats eight and features a smooth matt finish applied with Danish oil. Made to order with a 3-week lead time, ensuring freshness and quality control. A matching bench is available as an optional addition. Built to last, with precision joinery and natural wood character throughout.
